query: SELECT standard_code, title, category FROM australian_standards ORDER BY category, standard_code;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user qcNV4qQD7qpkaJ4.fb5a500c82ee --database APFRAaBLqYVeRNQZ9fu2LF --execute SELECT standard_code, title, category FROM australian_standards ORDER BY category, standard_code;

rows.title: Compendium of Australian Standards for Construction Materials
Fixed platforms, walkways, stairways and ladders

NCC-2022-Vol1	National Construction Code 2022 - Volume One	NCC
